ops.text:
WF-A CLOSE-OUT (orchestrator, 2026-07-20) — final disposition per item:

- Item 4 (enrich failure isolation): SHIPPED 2026-07-19 as 328f82f927b7 (ported from wfa onto post-v14.6 main by a dedicated lane; all four CI workflows green).
- Item 2 (prompt-cache restructure): ADOPT executed. The E19.B gate resolved NULL (ledger 7db0bfbd5: c003-m2 delta −0.008, CI [−0.080, +0.072], MDE_paired 0.059), so per the pre-registered ship rule the restructure ships ALONE — JUDGE semantic content stays exactly v6; version bumps triage 6→7 / audit 5→6 / refine 3→4 are structural. Port lane onto current main (712e2291) running now; ship follows gates. NOTE the bumps re-judge the corpus (unjudged jumps to ~5776) — this is the expected loud drain, and it doubles as the free re-labeling pass E20 recommended (the noise pocket rides the v7 re-judge).
- Item 3 (stage limits): recommendation stands (TRIAGE 300 / REFINE 200 / ENRICH 200-250 / AUDIT 60 under the assumed 15M-opus/night budget; ~440 triage rows post-item-2) but is NOT applied — blocked on the operator confirming the real subscription overnight cap. Surfaced to the user in the campaign close-out.
- Item 1 (concurrency 429 sweep): DEFERRED — the 07-19 environment was confounded (non-stationary editable install + shared rate budget). Rig preserved at ~/.cc-steer/experiments/WFA/scripts/ (capture shim, run_stage, slices, table); re-run needs frozen code + a sole-consumer window; ~$9 of the lane budget preserved. Backlog task created.
- Caveat-2 follow-up (strip the ~35-40K-token Claude Code baseline from judge calls via tools=""/max_turns=1 through the extract path — likely dwarfs the 32% static-block win): backlog task created.
